summary: Migrated omp-discord-bridge to omp-chat using matrix-sdk. Replaced all Discord-specific types (channel_id -> room_id) and API calls. Set up local Continuwuity Docker support.
details: Ported the Discord bridge to Matrix. Replaced `serenity` with `matrix-sdk` 0.16, retaining the same OMP invocation, retry logic, and session persistence features. Switched to `omp-chat` branding everywhere. Included a docker-compose.yml for a local `continuwuity` homeserver and updated the systemd installation script. Fixed compiler errors including upgrading to stable rustc 1.88.0 and patching the matrix-sdk depth limit issue using `rust-toolchain.toml` with `#![recursion_limit = "256"]`.
